feedback.text: Hello, please add protections for video games as well. Some games have already been destroyed, but we can make it stop. Dont let companies destroy the games youve purchased with your own money. If you buy something with your own money, you should be able to do what you want with itbecause you own it. That doesnt mean companies have to keep the game running forever, but they should at least leave it to the community and allow them to help keep it running, if they want to.
